issues.title: All keywords have zero impressions
issues.reasoning: All 49 keywords have 0 impressions over 30 days despite a $100/day budget. Keywords are either not eligible, have near-zero search volume, or are blocked by policy.
issues.action: Review keyword eligibility. Replace low-volume keywords with broader alternatives. Check geo-targeting.
issues.estimatedImpact: Could unlock up to $3000/month in delivery

issues.title: Negative keyword blocking positive keyword
issues.reasoning: Negative 'free' (broad match) blocks positive 'free', preventing ads from showing for a keyword you want to target.
issues.action: Remove or narrow 'free', or change to exact match to stop blocking 'free'.

issues.title: Negative keyword blocking positive keyword
issues.reasoning: Negative 'jobs' (broad match) blocks positive 'jobs', preventing ads from showing for a keyword you want to target.
issues.action: Remove or narrow 'jobs', or change to exact match to stop blocking 'jobs'.

issues.title: Negative keyword blocking positive keyword
issues.reasoning: Negative 'rental' (broad match) blocks positive 'rental', preventing ads from showing for a keyword you want to target.
issues.action: Remove or narrow 'rental', or change to exact match to stop blocking 'rental'.

issues.title: Campaign has zero spend
issues.reasoning: Campaign has $100/day budget but $0 spend in 30 days — something is fundamentally blocking delivery.
issues.action: Check serving status, ad approval, billing, and targeting settings.
issues.estimatedImpact: Unlock up to $3000/month in potential delivery

issues.title: Losing 71.59% impression share to ad rank
issues.reasoning: Losing 71.59% of impressions to ad rank — bids too low or Quality Score needs work. Average Quality Score is 2.82/10, dragging down rank.
issues.action: Improve ad relevance and landing page experience. Consider increasing bids on top keywords.
issues.estimatedImpact: Recovering 71.59% lost impressions from rank improvements
